description: Narrative prompt bank for coherence_sweep. Each prompt is designed to elicit named characters, a setting, and ongoing continuity — the raw material our entity / repetition / diversity metrics measure. Change this file and your metric history becomes non-comparable, so version it carefully.

prompts.text:
